title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!
